title: Lite Optimizations
description: Lite Optimizations (LO) is an ultra-light optimization-focused modpack that keeps Minecraft 100% vanilla — no extra interfaces, no HUD clutter, no QoL mods. Just clean, stable, and fast gameplay.
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ec6cc03332a2f9cb6cde5d3187b98071ee4f93d_0.webp)

**Lite Optimizations** (LO) is a minimalist, performance-focused modpack designed to offer the 
smoothest possible Minecraft experience — without changing how the game looks or plays.

No extra UI. No helpful tooltips. No minimaps, extra HUDs, or enhanced crafting guides.
Just vanilla Minecraft, running faster and more stable than ever.

Whether you’re playing on a low-end PC or just want the cleanest, distraction-free experience possible, LO delivers pure gameplay with zero bloat.

##   Key Features:

-  No visual or gameplay changes – no JEI, AppleSkin, minimaps, or recipe books.

- Only performance mods – hand-picked to boost FPS and reduce lag.

-  Vanilla experience preserved – everything feels just like unmodded Minecraft.

- Perfect for low-end PCs – or anyone who loves the simplicity of vanilla.

##  Mods Included:

### Built on Fabric, LO includes only trusted, well-maintained optimization mods, such as:

-  Lithium – tick & physics optimization

-   FerriteCore – memory usage improvements

-   Sodium – fast graphics rendering
- (...and more, depending on your setup)
